parts.text:
Generate a 2D sprite icon for a tower defense game UI. This is a WAVE/SWORD icon representing enemy waves.

Requirements:
- Prompt: "Fantasy sword and shield icon, medieval style, crossed swords with wave banner, game UI icon, transparent background, silver and red color, stylized cartoon"
- Content type: UI icon
- Art style: Fantasy cartoon/medieval matching a tower defense game
- Save to: Assets/Art/UI/Icons/icon_wave.png
- This is Mode A (Sprite only, no animation needed)

The game has a fantasy medieval theme. Make the icon crisp and readable at small UI sizes.
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
